then 		mkdir -p bash-patches; 		first="$(printf '%03d' "$(( _BASH_BASELINE_PATCH + 1 ))")"; 		last="$(printf '%03d' "$_BASH_LATEST_PATCH")"; 		majorMinor="${_BASH_VERSION%.*}"; 		for patch in $(seq -w "$first" "$last");
